song_name: Miley Cyrus - Party In The Usa - We Cant Stop - Used To Be Young
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
I like the story this mashup tells. 
Try playing it with fingerpicking until the first Chorus, then strum, and end with fingerpicking the Outro.
Transpose to suit your voice.

[Party in the USA]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Em[/ch]
I hopped off the plane at L.A.X.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
With a dream and my cardigan[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
Welcome to the land of fame excess,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
Am I gonna fit in?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Jumped in the cab,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Here I am for the first time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
Look to my right and I see the Hollywood sign[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Em[/ch]
This is all so crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
Everybody seems so famous[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
My tummy's turnin'[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
and I'm feelin' kinda home sick[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Too much pressure and I'm nervous,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Em[/ch]
That's when the taxi man turned on the radio[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
And a Jay-Z song was on[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
And a Jay-Z song was on[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
And a Jay-Z song was on[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]
So I put my hands up[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
They're playing my song,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
And the butterflies fly a-way[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
I'm noddin' my head like yeah[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
I'm movin' my hips like yeah[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
I got my hands up[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
They're playing my song,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I know I'm gonna be okay[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, it's a party in the USA[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Em[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]
Yeah, it's a party in the USA[/tab]

[We Can't Stop]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Red cups and sweaty bodies everywhere[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Hands in the air like we don't care[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
'Cause we came to have so much fun now[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Got somebody here might get some now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
If you're not ready to go home[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Can I get a "Hell, no!"?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
'Cause we're gonna go all night[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
'Til we see the sunlight, alright[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]
So la da di da di  We like to party[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Dancing with you and me[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]Am[/ch]
Doing whatever we want[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]
This is our house, This is our rules[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
And we can't stop[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
And we won't stop[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Can't you see it's we who own the night?[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Can't you see it's we who 'bout that life?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
And we can't stop[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
And we won't stop[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
We run things, things don't run we, Don't take nothing from nobody, Yeah,[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Yeah[/tab]

[Used To Be Young]

[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
The truth is bulletproof, there's no foolin' you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I don't dress the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Me and who you say I was yesterday[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F[/ch]
Have gone our separate ways[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Left my livin' fast somewhere in the past[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause that's for chasin' cars[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]
Turns out open bars lead to broken hearts[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]F[/ch]
And going way too far[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  I know I used to be crazy,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  I know I used to be fun[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  You say I used to be wild,[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]
  I say I used to be young[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
  You tell me time has done changed me,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E[/ch]
  That's fine, I've had a good run[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  I know I used to be crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
  That's 'cause I used to be young[/tab]

[Outro]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
I got my hands up[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]
They're playing my song,[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
I know I'm gonna be okay[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
And we can't stop[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
And we won't stop[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
  I know I used to be crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                            [ch]C[/ch]
  That's 'cause I used to be young[/tab]
